div.span:
Architect dispatches wave thread
mission correlationId

Hub surfaces wave
thread / message / pulse

Engineer engages thread
claims wave or task

Engineer updates work trace
resumption + in-flight

Open PR
mission/task context + test plan

Architect reviews PR diff
CI status

Request changes
reply on PR-review thread

Approve and merge
queue or admin squash when warranted

Engineer updates work trace
landed commits + verification

Hub plannedTasks cascade
issues next task

Architect sets Mission status
active to completed

Engineer closing audit
or final verification
